metadata.name: Nut Library
metadata.description: ISO 4032/4033/8673/7040/10511 hex nut master geometry across ISO metric M3-M64. Extended in Faz 2.4.1B with ISO 4035/4161/7042, EN 14399-4, DIN 929/557/1587 families.
metadata.primary_source: ISO 4032/4033/8673/7040/10511 product-dimension standards. height_mm is a verified standard-table value only for the sizes listed in VERIFIED_ISO4032_HEIGHT; all other height_mm values are ratio-estimated (reference_only).

records.notes: Standard hex nut, style 1. height_mm is the verified ISO 4032 standard table value for M3. width_across_flats_mm is the standard ISO 4017-family table value.

Standard hex nut, style 1. height_mm is ratio-estimated (~0.8xdiameter), NOT read from the ISO 4032 dimensional table -- verify before production use. width_across_flats_mm is the standard ISO 4017-family table value.
